name: WebGPU Trainer
tagline: Kick off training runs on a mesh of volunteer WebGPU workers
description: Coordinator UI + API for orchestrating simple training/compute jobs across a mesh of browser workers exposing WebGPU. MVP: run creation, worker registration/heartbeats, task claiming and reporting.

env_vars.description: Optional Bearer token required for admin endpoints (creating runs, enqueuing tasks). If unset, admin endpoints are open (demo mode).
